label: hate
rationale: 'No wonder Hitler loved you Muslims so much ... irrational hatred of Jewish People' - collective attribution of Nazi-like hatred to Muslims as a religious group.

label: offensive
rationale: 'intellectually challenged ... reasoning is akin to that of Nemo ... invite a goat instead' - personal insult of a named individual, not group-based.

label: offensive
rationale: 'Wakule ujinga wao ama huyo Muhindi awanunulie' - crude mockery of voters and a politician, ethnic marker present but attack is political not collective.

label: neither
rationale: 'Gachagua is playing Rutos politics of planting idiots around mt Kenya' - criticism of Gachagua's political strategy, not attacking Mt Kenya people as a group.

label: hate
rationale: 'many black people, in particular, steal so much' - collective attribution of criminality to Black people as a racial group.

label: hate
rationale: 'After Ruto we block any other Kalenjin by all means necessary' - declares entire Kalenjin community categorically unfit to lead, NCIC ethnic exclusion.

label: offensive
rationale: 'Wamunyoru worshippers ... are these people rafting? Brainless' - insults directed at political supporters of a faction, not ethnic group as such.

label: hate
rationale: 'Only a Kikuyu would say that because they hope ...' - attributes a political motive collectively to all Kikuyus.

label: neither
rationale: 'Gachagua is more of a threat to Linda Mwananchi than Ruto. A mole' - criticism of Gachagua as an individual politician, not group-based.

label: neither
rationale: 'Somalis voted for raila since 2007' then 'you guys who brought cos you voted for ruto' - ethnic-bloc electoral analysis plus political criticism, no contempt.

label: hate
rationale: 'Wamunyoro mongrels hukua na hasira sana' - dehumanizing term 'mongrels' applied collectively to an ethnic community.

label: neither
rationale: 'This was the work of Kibaki and Martha Karua Cops killing Luos' - historical claim about state violence, descriptive not advocating.

label: neither
rationale: 'Tumejua 30% ya waluhya in Ruto government iko wapi?' - question about Luhya representation in government, electoral arithmetic.

label: neither
rationale: 'Sha is working only in Olkalou ... Kikuyu mp should as well vacate his seat' - sarcastic criticism of government program implementation.

label: hate
rationale: 'No tribe will ever try Kalenjin again' - collective ethnic exclusion declaration, NCIC standard for stirring ethnic separation.

label: neither
rationale: 'Ol Kalou people are ungovernable' - humorous comment about locality voters, banter not hate.

label: neither
rationale: 'bookten kama aka hii area kasusu itaumia soon' - unclear threat but target and meaning ambiguous.

label: offensive
rationale: 'constituents are all scumbag racist POS' - crude insult of district voters, offensive but not based on protected characteristic.

label: offensive
rationale: 'Sosion is another brainless ... Umbwa wewe ghasia' - crude personal abuse of a named politician using Sheng profanity.

label: neither
rationale: Describes ethnic exclusion in university appointments as a problem to be rejected: 'The installation of Mr. Maiyo MUST be rejected' - condemning ethnic capture, not expressing it.

label: neither
rationale: 'kumbe ni mbwa mwitu' - calls Kasongo/Ruto a wild dog for excluding Mt Kenya people, personal insult of politician in defense of community.

label: neither
rationale: 'almost 2000 Kenyans were brutally murdered in ethnic clashes some led by the Kalenjin Warriors during the 1992 polls' - historical reference warning against violence recurrence, not advocating.

label: neither
rationale: 'Just because he has won one single seat in Kikuyu land ... Ruto will show you people dust in 2027' - electoral analysis and prediction, geographic reference not ethnic attack.

label: offensive
rationale: 'Ile upuzi ... fala ... That's why the white man said Africans can't reule themselves' - cites colonial racist trope while criticizing an individual leader's greed, offensive framing.

label: neither
rationale: 'Kikuyu hate Ruto cos he reneged on their shareholder script' - attributes political motivation to Kikuyus as bloc, electoral analysis not contempt.
